title: Loctite Super Glue Perfect Pen, Glue Pen for Precise Application, Superglue Gel Dries Clear for Invisible Repairs, Clear Glue for Vertical Surfaces, 3 g
features: Clean & precise – With soft rubber grips and a precision applicator, the instant adhesive is easy to handle. Ideal for home & office repairs, school projects & crafts.
Fast bonding – The super glue gel sets in seconds, ensuring fast application. A quick-open/lock-closed cap prevents accidental spills, clogging and buildup when not in use.
Dries clear – The colourless and flexible all purpose glue dries clear. Great for making small, discreet repairs around the home or shop and can withstand heavy loads.
Versatile use – Bonds to many materials such as ceramic, rubber, paper & metal, but also works as a leather, plastic* or wood glue. Features a glue applicator tip. Great for jewellery and shoe repair
Practical Delivery – Loctite Super Glue Creative Pen, strong glue gel with anti-clog cap and precision applicator, Cyanoacrylate, clear, 1 x 4 g Pen, item no. 2112877
